chapter_title.en: The One Praying Encounters Predatory Animals and Harmful Creatures and He Kills Them

text: 1069 - وَ سَأَلَ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَحْتَكُّ وَ هُوَ فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1069 - Al-Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a person who scratches himself while in prayer. He (as) replied: "There is no harm."
